summary: Reset Progress Stats feature fully verified - Backend 13/13 tests passed, Frontend UI working with reset buttons and confirmation dialogs

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity not rendering in web DOM
ui_bugs.note: This is a React Native Web limitation, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend reset endpoints correctly isolated - reset/streak only affects streak, not chapters or journal
reset/chapters clears both total_chapters_read and reading_history as expected
reset/journal clears both total_journal_entries and journal_entries collection
reset/history only clears reading_history, not the chapters count
All reset endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Invalid stat type returns 400 with helpful error message

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All reset buttons visible and working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reset progress stats feature is fully implemented and working. Backend has individual reset endpoints for streak, chapters, journal, and history. Frontend shows 'Azzera' buttons under each stat card on /reading-progress page. window.confirm is used for confirmation on web. The 'Azzera Cronologia' button only appears when there is reading history to clear.

reset_streak.behavior: Zeroes reading_streak and last_reading_date, preserves chapters and journal

reset_history.behavior: Only deletes reading_history, chapters count unchanged

frontend_reset_buttons.confirmation_dialog: window.confirm on web shows 'Azzera Statistica' title with specific message

test_classes: TestResetProgressEndpoints - 5 tests for basic endpoint functionality
TestResetStreakIsolation - 1 test verifying streak reset isolation

frontend_playwright.confirmation_dialog: PASSED - window.confirm appeared with correct message
